actionUnits.condition: Manually open the tab to instantiate and enable its page and run the fade-in transition. Target MonoBehaviour (Tab) id=904, guid=c2bcf79fd38b2441fa17fde42cfce34d, with pagePrefab guid=e749a5bf695bb464390eb1ffd27aba4f and cachePage=false. This should invoke UIFadeTransition (id=903, guid=a4ab599ee1dbcea41b165ae5170d9f03) TransitionIn with durationSeconds=0.25 and transitionInDelaySeconds=0.1875.
